creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
+++ This bug was initially created as a clone of Bug #195059 and Bug #197522 +++

Last commit[1] was in ports r389268 (a year ago), last bugzilla activity[1] was in bug 206235 comment 2. At present 24 ports maintained by bf@ are out of date[3]. Patches (e.g. bug 208594, bug 207814) only land per timeout[4]. Having such bugs "Assigned To" bf@ is misleading because he is not be responsible for any regressions that may arise. And feedback timeouts may discourage new contributors from submitting more bugs/patches.

[1] https://freshbsd.org/search?committer=bf&project=freebsd-ports
[2] https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/buglist.cgi?f1=longdesc&o1=changedby&query_format=advanced&v1=bf%40freebsd.org
[3] http://portscout.freebsd.org/bf@freebsd.org.html
[4] https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/buglist.cgi?quicksearch=assignee%3Abf+status%3Aclosed
